activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Mann Teknik AB
Strandvägen 16
SE542 39, MARIESTAD
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Mann Teknik AB
Strandvägen 16
SE-542 22 MARIESTAD
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Mann Teknik AB' with address in Mariestad, Sweden can be clearly identified in the invoice header and address blocks. Land matches exactly after normalization. No contradictions found. Rule 4.1.0 (Corporate structure) applied successfully allowing consignor name match not strictly limited to invoice issuer.

consignee.certificate_value:
Kanon Liquid Handling
Suite 4, Brookside Business C.
Spring Road, Ibstock
Leicestershire LE67 6LR
United Kingdom of Great Britain and
Northern Ireland
consignee.invoice_value:
Kanon Liquid Handling
(sourced as reference indicated, no direct mention in invoice text but implied via order references and address)
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Kanon Liquid Handling' as specified matches invoice buyer or reference context. UK as consignee country is consistent. Despite limited direct textual mention of consignee in invoice, order and reference fields allow identification. Normalization rules applied.

goods_description.certificate_value:
One pallet of couplings
N6100D4401 Breakaway Ind. 6"-6" ANSI Cl. 150 SS FPM
SEG-26D-443262
goods_description.invoice_value:
N6100D4401
BREAKAWAY IND. 6"- 6" ANSI Cl.150
SS FPM
goods_description.motivation: Article number 'N6100D4401' matches exactly between certificate and invoice (rule 4.3.2). Certificate's general goods description is supported by explicit invoice references (rule 4.3.5). No contradictory descriptions found.

quantity.motivation: Quantity '1 pcs' in certificate found exactly in invoice under the quantity column for article N6100D4401. Units correspond exactly. Normalization of representation applied.

origin.invoice_value:
Country of origin: Sweden
These products are of European Community preferential origin.
origin.motivation: Certificate indicates origin 'EU (Sweden)'. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden' and confirms European Community preferential origin. EU normalization rules applied allowing this equivalence and matching.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All key control points including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity and origin match exactly or within allowed normalization. No contradictions or uncertainties requiring manual review were found.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla viktiga uppgifter i certifikatet, såsom avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprung, stämmer överens med fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
